student_input: I got 450/1100 in Matric, 400/1100 in FSc, and 30/200 in MDCAT. Can I get admission in King Edward Medical University?

state.student_input: I got 450/1100 in Matric, 400/1100 in FSc, and 30/200 in MDCAT. Can I get admission in King Edward Medical University?
state.advice: Although your current merit score of 26.14% falls short of the eligibility criteria, don't be discouraged. Focus on improving your scores, particularly in the MDCAT, which carries the most weight (50%) in the merit formula. With a score of 30 out of 200 in the MDCAT, there's significant room for improvement. Consider retaking the MDCAT and preparing thoroughly to increase your chances of getting into King Edward Medical University. Additionally, review the eligibility criteria carefully and ensure you meet all the requirements. Stay motivated, work hard, and you can increase your merit score and become eligible for admission.
